MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Tito Torres, Esq. for plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority with property manager, present.
Jerome Schweich, Esq. appearing on limited scope representation for defendant Anchulita Uribe, who is also present.

This cause comes on regularly for settlement conference. Settlement discussions held. The case does not settle. Trial date to remain set.
